data.title: ECP and Sage collaborate for real-time visibility in senior living, benefiting 8,000 communities with faster responses.
data.description: In a recent development, a new integration has been established linking Sage's real-time alerting system with ECP's clinical documentation software. This integration aims to aid caregivers in providing quicker responses and ensuring more precise documentation of care. The announcement was made in Milwaukee on January 12, 2026, according to PRNewswire. ECP, renowned for being an all-encompassing software platform, is currently relied upon by over 8,000 senior living communities for their operational needs.

data.title: Jinal Jhaveri returns as CEO of SchoolMint, leading K-12 Enrollment solutions. Co-founder Bryan MacDonald steps down.
data.description: In Lafayette, Louisiana, SchoolMint, a prominent provider of Strategic Enrollment Management solutions for K-12 schools, declared that co-founder Jinal Jhaveri is now the Chief Executive Officer. Jhaveri takes over from Bryan MacDonald, the CEO for six years, who will stay connected to the company as an advisor and investor. SchoolMint was established in 2013 by Jhaveri and his spouse, Forum Desai, after encountering enrollment difficulties.

data.title: White Castle is offering Valentine's Day dinner at participating restaurants, turning them into "Love Castles" in 2026.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, come Valentine's Day in 2026, the pioneering fast food hamburger chain in America is set to convert selected restaurants into enchanting "Love Castles".

data.title: Report analyzes Neutral-Atom Quantum Computing Market 2026-2036, focusing on QuEra-Google, Atom Computing-Microsoft, Pasqal with 1,000-to-Million-Qubit roadmap toward fault-tolerant systems.
data.description: A new report titled "The Global Neutral-Atom Quantum Computing Market 2026-2036" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. The report offers comprehensive insights into the market, with forecasts for the period 2026-2036. It is segmented by technology category, application domain, customer type, and geographic region. The analysis includes competitive positioning, investment trends, technology readiness assessments, and profiles of 32 key organizations influencing the market. This report is a valuable resource for understanding the neutral-atom quantum computing market, with significant data for the next decade.

data.title: Strategy Inc. buys 13,627 BTC for $1.25 billion at $91,519/coin. Company now holds 687,410 BTC purchased for $51.80 billion. MSTR stock teeters at $150 support. Largest BTC purchase since July 2025. Funding via sale of shares.
data.description: Strategy Inc. recently made a significant move in the crypto market by acquiring 13,627 Bitcoin (BTC) for $1.25 billion, with an average price per coin at $91,519. This acquisition is the largest since July 2025 and brings the total Bitcoin held by the company to 687,410, acquired for $51.80 billion at an average price of $75,353 per coin. However, despite this, the company's stock is facing a critical test, with the price hovering around the $150 support level, raising concerns about a potential breakdown. To fund this latest purchase, Strategy sold 1.2 million STRC preferred shares for $119.1 million and 6.8 million MSTR common shares for $1.13 billion. This acquisition marks Strategy's largest Bitcoin purchase in 2026 and is the biggest since July 2025, surpassing two previous $1 billion BTC transactions.

data.title: NBCU and Graebel win silver in Brandon Hall Group's Talent Mobility category; awards recognize engagement and productivity.
data.description: In Denver, NBCUniversal (NBCU) was honored with a Brandon Hall Group Silver award in Talent Mobility, in collaboration with Graebel Companies, Inc. The prestigious 2025 Brandon Hall Group Excellence in Action Awards™ acknowledge organizations dedicated to improving employee engagement and fostering a people-centric culture. This accolade highlights NBCU's commitment to enhancing productivity through employee feedback.

data.title: Accelsius raises $65M in Series B funding led by Johnson Controls to scale liquid cooling for AI factories; Legrand joins round.
data.description: Accelsius, a Texas-based company, has recently closed a Series B funding round. The company announced this news in Austin, revealing that they raised an undisclosed amount of money. Accelsius specializes in liquid cooling technology and has successfully secured funding from various investors to support their growth and innovation in this field.

data.title: OnlineEd, LLC expands real estate education by acquiring Empire Learning, LP's assets. Acquisition took place in Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: OnlineEd, LLC has recently expanded its reach in real estate continuing education to support REALTORS® nationwide. The company announced its acquisition of Empire Learning, LP from Dallas, Tex. The assets were acquired on January 12, 2026. This move will amplify the geographic coverage of real estate education services across the U.S., aiding the success of real estate professionals.

data.title: University of Detroit Jesuit High School appoints class of 2006 graduate, Fr. Dixon, as its 31st president.
data.description: The University of Detroit Jesuit High School and Academy in Detroit has announced the appointment of Fr. Daniel Dixon '06, S.J., as its 31st president after a comprehensive search process. Fr. Dixon, a former student from the class of 2006, brings a unique perspective to the role, making this a significant appointment.

data.title: ProductPlan acquires Winware.ai to boost product intelligence with AI. Steven Cohn becomes CEO.
data.description: In an effort to enhance product planning and decision-making, ProductPlan has acquired a company specializing in AI-driven customer and market intelligence. This acquisition appoints Steven Cohn, a successful entrepreneur known for leading groundbreaking product research platforms, as the new CEO. The announcement was made in Denver on January 12, 2026. The move aims to combine expertise from both companies and leverage AI technology to improve strategic planning processes for businesses.

data.title: Nordstrom to open 2 new stores in PA - Exton and Media - in fall 2026. Expanding presence in Pennsylvania.
data.description: Seattle's Nordstrom, Inc., a renowned fashion retailer, is set to expand with the opening of two Nordstrom Rack stores in Pennsylvania. The upcoming stores in Exton and Media are scheduled to launch in the fall of 2026. This strategic move demonstrates Nordstrom's commitment to growth in new markets, providing customers in these areas with access to their quality products.

data.title: Axon Vision gets order from Leonardo DRS for AI C-UAS system, valued at undisclosed amount, on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: Axon Vision, a prominent supplier of AI-driven solutions for defense purposes based in Tel Aviv, Israel, disclosed today that it has secured a contract from Leonardo DRS to supply its latest AI-oriented system designed for C-UAS operations. The deal holds significance as it is valued at a substantial amount of money.

data.title: Cathy Tang appointed as QDOBA's Chief Legal Officer to aid in doubling size of 840-restaurant brand.
data.description: QDOBA, a rapidly expanding brand with 840 restaurants, revealed the addition of industry veteran Cathy Tang to their leadership team. The company aims to double the size of its restaurant chain, with a focus on growth in the Mexican fast-casual category. This announcement was made on Jan. 12, 2026, in San Diego.

data.title: Spectrum opens applications for sixth class of Spectrum Scholars, offering $300,000 in scholarships to 15 students.
data.description: Fifteen college students will receive scholarships totaling $300,000 along with internship opportunities and a two-year professional development program. Spectrum is granting $20,000 to each student, making their total investment in Spectrum Scholars exceed $2 million since 2020.

data.title: Threadlock Precision, backed by The D. E. Shaw Group, buys Kremin Inc. to bolster U.S. aerospace & defense manufacturing.
data.description: In Frankenmuth, Michigan on January 12, 2026, Threadlock Precision revealed the acquisition of Kremin Inc., a CNC machining company in Michigan with over 40 years of experience in serving aerospace, defense, and medical sectors. Threadlock Precision, a network of expanding precision manufacturing firms, made this significant move to enhance its industry presence.

data.title: Report highlights 550 Largest Cellular IoT Projects Worldwide with broad deployment across various verticals - automotive, transport, logistics, utilities, infrastructure, and industrial sectors. Valuable insights for stakeholders.
data.description: Dublin - Recently, a report titled "Largest Cellular IoT Projects Worldwide - 9th Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the 550 Largest Cellular IoT Projects on a global scale, providing essential information for those in the telecommunications field, including telecom operators, platform providers, hardware manufacturers, investors, consultants, and government agencies. This resource offers valuable insights into the IoT market.

data.title: STG Logistics to eliminate 91% debt, infuse $150M, enter restructuring process to strengthen financial foundation.
data.description: The company has entered a restructuring support agreement aiming to eliminate around 91% of its debt and inject up to $150 million of new capital. It has also started a prearranged financial restructuring process to execute these transactions. Despite this, normal operations will persist without interruption.

data.title: Broffy is the first AI Pet Chat App launched in New York on Jan. 12, 2026, offering personalized companion experience.
data.description: Introducing Broffy, a cutting-edge application merging artificial intelligence with pet care to provide users with a uniquely tailored companion experience. Recently launched in New York on January 12, 2026, this innovative app, known as Broffy, revolutionizes the concept of pet ownership by infusing emotional connection into the interaction. It stands as the pioneering AI Pet Chat App, showcasing the boundless possibilities when technology meets companionship.

data.title: Metallium sets up Level 1 ADR program with Bank of New York for trading on OTCQX with ticker MTLMY.
data.description: Metallium (ASX: MTM; OTCQX: MTMCF and MTLMY) revealed the launch of a Level 1 sponsored American Depository Receipts (ADR) program with the Bank of New York. The ADRs will trade on the OTCQX platform under the symbol MTLMY starting today.
